Store Information

Official Name: The Wandering Lantern

Tagline: "Follow the light, find the wonder"

Location: 15729 Madison Ave, Lakewood, OH 44107

Phone: (216) 999-4462

Email: thewanderinglanterncle@gmail.com

Website: thewanderinglantern.com

Social Media:
Instagram: @thewanderinglanterncle
Facebook: @thewanderinglantern

Hours:
Tuesday - Saturday: 12 PM - 8 PM
Sunday - Monday: Closed

About The Wandering Lantern (Boilerplate)

The Wandering Lantern is Cleveland's first dedicated children's bookstore, offering a curated selection of picture books, middle grade novels, young adult fiction, and educational materials. Founded by Emily Mitchell and Michael Plant, the store serves as a community hub for families seeking quality children's literature and literary programming. Located in Lakewood's vibrant Madison Avenue district, The Wandering Lantern hosts regular storytimes, author events, and seasonal celebrations designed to spark imagination and foster a lifelong love of reading.

Press Releases

The Wandering Lantern: Cleveland's First Dedicated Children's Bookstore Opens in Lakewood

November 1, 2025

Local entrepreneurs Emily Mitchell and Michael Plant bring independent children's bookstore to Madison Avenue, filling a gap in Cleveland's literary landscape.
